jobs.name: Daily Morning Briefing
jobs.prompt:
You are preparing Zeus's Daily Briefing for Duy at 5:15AM PST (13:15 UTC).

FIRST, read Catthew's latest family briefing output from the most recent file in /home/hermes/.hermes/profiles/catthew/cron/output/c729ba85e251/ to extract household tasks, events, and family items for today.

Then read the latest Daily note from /vault/Daily/ — find today's date (2026-05-18) and if it doesn't exist, read the most recent one. Extract the task sections from it (Overdue, Due Today, This Week, Next Week, Later/No Date).

Then fetch fresh data: stocks, weather, headlines, horoscope.

Keep it COMPACT — one screen, no scrolling. Follow this structure:

## 1. HEADER
"# 📅 [Day], [YYYY-MM-DD] · W[week] · Victoria: [age]"
Moon phase icon + name. One relevant quote (≤1 line).

## 2. FROM CATTHEW
Summarize Catthew's household briefing in 2-3 bullet points — today's family events, upcoming items, standing chores/errands.

## 3. TASKS (from Daily note)
- ⚠️ Overdue — list from the Daily note's Overdue section (max 5)
- 📌 Today — list from Due Today section
- 📅 This Week — list from This Week section
Use the same format as the Daily note (wiki-links). Skip Later/No Date.

## 4. STOCKS (compact — only tickers that moved >2%, plus VIX/TNX)
Format as single line per ticker: `TICKER $price (chg%)` — no table, no columns.
Max 8 tickers. Skip 52W range, P/E, market cap, target.

## 5. HEADLINES
Merge Morning Brew + finance into 5-6 one-line bullets. No sources, no dates.

## 6. WEATHER
Single compact section — 3 cities × today+tomorrow only:
`City | Today Hi/Lo Cond | Tomorrow Hi/Lo Cond`

## 7. HOROSCOPE
Sagittarius: 1-2 sentences max.

## 8. FOOTER
"Generated [HH:MM] · Catthew ran at 5AM PST"

No earnings section. Tone: tight, informative, scannable.
